description:
🕒 17:00–20:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Ecotourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-morimana-natsunomushi/

There's an old saying about summer insects drawn to flames, and night lights really do attract a surprising variety of insects — from popular species to kinds hardly anyone knows about. We'll set up light traps in Hanno's rich satoyama (semi-natural grassland) and take a leisurely look at the insects that gather. You might even spot other wildlife besides insects! Come learn about the fascinating ecology of creatures active at night.

【Fee】
Adults: ¥6,000 | Students: ¥5,000 | Preschool children: ¥3,000
(includes guide, insurance, and materials)

【Capacity】15 people

【Guide】Mori no Field Gakusha (Forest Field School) staff

【What to bring】Drinks, flashlight, rain gear, gloves, insect repellent spray, notebook, writing materials

【More info】Mori no Field Gakusha website: https://morinomanabiya168.wixsite.com/website
location: 集合 飯能市立博物館前（国際興業バス「OH!!!・天覧山下」または「市民会館・博物館」下車徒歩3分
summary: Summer insects drawn to light — observe insects with a light trap
